title: T3: DECISION batch — the 14 corpus questions A–N
prompt: research/INDEX.md's 'Open questions across repos' table holds 14 corpus-modeling questions A-N marked 'require David's call before Phase 2' — yet Phase 2 ran (corpus now ~1,150 rows) and ~30 distillations shipped on implicit defaults nobody wrote down. Produce a DECISION ARTIFACT, not a build: docs/corpus-questions-a-n-decisions.md with one section per question, each carrying the question verbatim, disk-verified evidence (grep probes against research/artifacts.jsonl, schema-history.md rulings, recon reports — never doc-status claims), an honest status class (A is David-ruled via schema-history 0.0.3; B/D/F/L are David-deferred to Phase 2.5; C/G/I/J are settled de-facto by discover practice; E is resolved by recon — 'Alec' = alex.md the Workflow Architect; H/K/M/N are open with authored defaults), a DEFAULT that downstream distillation tickets (T3-06+) proceed under, and an executable ESCALATION TRIGGER for when the default stops being safe. Mark the whole doc PROVISIONAL pending David's bulk-ratify/override at triage; provisional defaults still govern downstream work — that is the unblock. Link it from docs/INDEX.md (one line). research/ is READ-ONLY without exception: change nothing under it, log its stale spots (questions table still says 'require David's call'; INDEX stats say 1,100 while artifacts.jsonl disagrees) in the doc's Stale-docs ledger for T8. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-05-corpus-questions-decision-batch.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: docs/corpus-questions-a-n-decisions.md exists with exactly 14 '## Q-' sections in letter order A-N, each containing bolded Question / Evidence (dated) / Status / Default / Escalation trigger / Effect on distillation fields, plus a PROVISIONAL status banner, a Ratification checklist section, and a 'Stale-docs ledger (for T8)' section. Status classes match the war game's Move 3 table unless a fork's downgrade/ruling rules fired (recorded in the results JSON). `grep -c 'corpus-questions-a-n-decisions' docs/INDEX.md` returns 1. A wg-t3-05 self-report exists in engine/store/results/ carrying the 14-letter status summary, and the commit is pushed. Negative: `git status --porcelain research/` is empty and `git diff HEAD~1 --stat -- research/` shows nothing (research/ untouched), no engine .py changed, and engine/store/needs-decision/ has a wg-t3-05 entry only if Fork F2 Route B or an abort fired.
